message:
bd-3fqg9: REST API server scaffold + middleware with chi router

- Add chi router with /api/v1 subrouter while preserving legacy /api/* routes
- Implement middleware stack: request_id, panic recovery, logging, CORS, auth
- Add response envelopes matching robot mode format (success/timestamp/error_code)
- Implement Idempotency-Key support with 24h TTL cache
- Add Jobs API for async operations (spawn, scan, checkpoint, import, export)
- Add capabilities endpoint returning auth modes, features, and tools
- Add comprehensive tests (22 passing)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
